productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Customised Black Shorts
description: Style Note You little boy will love these shorts this summer. These comfy shorts from gini and jony look great when worn with a bright tee and crocs slippers! Product Details Black shorts with a zipper and button closure on the front, elastication at the back, two pockets on the side, two patch pockets at the knee and two at the back. Zipper sliders at the inner of the shorts. Shorts can be zipped up into a small packet (with two short fabric handles)! Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent inside out with like colours  Do not tumble dry  Do not iron over on decor
